title: Work Monitor live
body: Dashboard wired up. WebSocket /ws/work-log + JSONL persistence + notes panel. Open http://localhost:8000/admin/work-monitor in a new browser tab.

title: Agent A: Multi-channel OAuth investigation complete
body: Found current 1:1 OAuth-to-channel architecture. ProfileDestination exists for fan-out but only after connect. Key gap: channels.list(mine=true) returns ALL brand accounts but code takes items[0]. Need new table + UI to pick from list at callback time.

title: Agent C done
body: Found 6 critical bugs: OAuth multi-channel crash, redirect_uri localhost hardcoding, missing user auth on disconnect, quota exhaustion silent fail, token revocation not surfaced, and channel_id/token mismatch in worker.

title: Agent B: Postiz Integration Plan Complete
body:
? Postiz Docker setup (Port 5000, PostgreSQL, AGPLv3)
? API surface documented (30 req/hr rate limit, Bearer auth)
? Kaizer admin gating verified (is_admin flag exists, auth.admin_required works)
? 10-step concrete plan with 280 LOC backend, 60 LOC frontend
? Risk matrix: TikTok/Instagram need 2-4 weeks; Discord/Bluesky ready today; Twitter/LinkedIn in 1-5 days
? New files: routers/postiz.py, clients/postiz.py, extended PublishModal.jsx
? Integration point: youtube_upload.py calls Postiz after YouTube success

title: SEC: ownership check on YT disconnect
body: DELETE /api/youtube/oauth/{channel_id} now requires user ownership. Cross-tenant disconnect vulnerability closed.

title: Multi-channel: backend done
body:
oauth.py: fetch_all_channel_metadata() returns every Brand Account.
exchange_code: auto-creates ProfileDestination row per channel with cached metadata (title, thumbnail, sub-count).
models.ProfileDestination: +5 metadata cols + enabled flag.
main.py startup migration adds the cols on existing DBs.
routers/channels.py: _to_dict now exposes destinations[] with rich metadata + new PATCH /channels/{id}/destinations/{gci} toggle endpoint.
Next: frontend picker UI.

title: Multi-channel picker UI shipped
body: YouTubeAccountsPanel now renders Brand Account toggles per primary card. Toggle calls PATCH /channels/{id}/destinations/{gci}. Optimistic UI with rollback on error.
